name: Zucchini Couscous
recipeIngredient: 3 cups vegetable stock or soy/vegetable chicken flavor broth
Your favorite seasonings (e.g., curry, garlic, Mrs. Dash)
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the 3 small zucchini and 1 small onion.
2. Place the zucchini and onion in a saucepan with 3 cups of vegetable stock or soy/vegetable chicken flavor broth.
3. Add your preferred seasonings (e.g., curry, garlic, Mrs. Dash).
4. Bring to a boil, then simmer for 15-20 minutes.
5. Add the couscous and turn off the heat.
6. Let stand for 5-10 minutes.
7. Serve as a main dish for 2 or side dish for 4-6 people.
P.S. Feel free to use your favorite vegetables (e.g., mushrooms, carrots, green beans) instead of zucchini. This is a quick and easy recipe.
